title: primula pinnatifida subsp. cephalantha
intro: Primula pinnatifida subsp. cephalantha, also known as the Alpine primrose, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the genus Primula. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and antispasmodic effects, which can help relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, as well as alleviate muscle spasms. The health benefits of Primula pinnatifida subsp. cephalantha include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
